name: TheSphinx
core_loop: The user asks yes/no questions via voice or text to an AI, analyzes the answers, and attempts to guess a secret famous person before running out of questions.
audience_proxy: Educated adults aged 25-45 who enjoy intellectual challenges, trivia, and sophisticated puzzle games.

palette.description: A dark, premium palette featuring a near-black background with glowing golden-yellow text and accents, creating a mysterious and sophisticated atmosphere.
